mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.storage_config_id, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, sc.name as storage_config_name FROM gb_site_storage_config_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_storage_configs sc ON r.storage_config_id = sc.id WHERE r.site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY r.sort_order, r.id

SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.storage_config_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, s.code as site_code, s.domain as site_domain, sc.name as storage_config_name FROM gb_site_storage_config_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_storage_configs sc ON r.storage_config_id = sc.id WHERE r.storage_config_id = #{storageConfigId} ORDER BY r.sort_order, r.id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gb_site_storage_config_relations WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND storage_config_id = #{storageConfigId} AND relation_type = 'include'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gb_site_storage_config_relations WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND storage_config_id = #{storageConfigId} AND relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_storage_config_relations ( site_id, storage_config_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{storageConfigId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{isEditable}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_storage_config_relations ( site_id, storage_config_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.storageConfigId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.isEditable}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), is_editable = VALUES(is_editable), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT site_id FROM gb_site_storage_config_relations WHERE storage_config_id = #{storageConfigId} AND relation_type = 'exclude' ORDER BY site_id
